tools.name: get_user_context
tools.description: Nara backend tool. Resolve the current Nara user, assistant personality, access state, task/reminder summary, and user-specific instructions. This must be the first tool call in every WhatsApp conversation.

parameters.userId: UUID string (optional when contactValue is provided)
parameters.contactValue: sender contact value such as WhatsApp phone number (optional when userId is provided)

tools.name: create_task
tools.description: Nara backend tool. Create a user-scoped task in Nara, not in OpenClaw internal state. Respect assistantProfile.autonomy and include confirmed=true only after confirmation when required.

parameters.userId: UUID string (optional when contactValue is provided)
parameters.contactValue: sender contact value (optional when userId is provided)
parameters.title: string (required)
parameters.confirmed: boolean (required when user autonomy requires confirmation)

tools.name: list_tasks
tools.description: Nara backend tool. List tasks scoped to the resolved Nara user from the Nara backend.

parameters.userId: UUID string (optional when contactValue is provided)
parameters.contactValue: sender contact value (optional when userId is provided)

tools.name: complete_task
tools.description: Nara backend tool. Mark a user-scoped Nara task as done by its ID. List tasks first if the user does not provide an ID.

parameters.userId: UUID string (optional when contactValue is provided)
parameters.contactValue: sender contact value (optional when userId is provided)
parameters.confirmed: boolean (required when user autonomy requires confirmation)

tools.name: delete_task
tools.description: Nara backend tool. Delete a user-scoped Nara task by ID. Always confirm with the user before calling.

parameters.userId: UUID string (optional when contactValue is provided)
parameters.contactValue: sender contact value (optional when userId is provided)

tools.name: create_reminder
tools.description: Nara backend tool. Create a user-scoped one-time or recurring reminder in Nara. Respect assistantProfile.autonomy and include confirmed=true only after confirmation when required.

parameters.userId: UUID string (optional when contactValue is provided)
parameters.contactValue: sender contact value (optional when userId is provided)
parameters.name: string (required)
parameters.timezone: IANA timezone string (optional, defaults to Asia/Jakarta)
parameters.confirmed: boolean (required when user autonomy requires confirmation)

tools.name: list_reminders
tools.description: Nara backend tool. List reminders scoped to the resolved Nara user from the Nara backend.

parameters.userId: UUID string (optional when contactValue is provided)
parameters.contactValue: sender contact value (optional when userId is provided)
parameters.enabled: boolean (optional) - filter paused or active reminders

tools.name: update_reminder
tools.description: Nara backend tool. Pause, resume, or edit a user-scoped Nara reminder by ID. List reminders first if the user does not provide an ID.

parameters.userId: UUID string (optional when contactValue is provided)
parameters.contactValue: sender contact value (optional when userId is provided)
parameters.name: string (optional)
parameters.confirmed: boolean (required when user autonomy requires confirmation)

tools.name: delete_reminder
tools.description: Nara backend tool. Delete a user-scoped Nara reminder by ID. Always confirm with the user before calling.

parameters.userId: UUID string (optional when contactValue is provided)
parameters.contactValue: sender contact value (optional when userId is provided)

tools.name: get_summary
tools.description: Nara backend tool. Get a user-scoped Nara summary: pending task count, overdue count, and next due task.

parameters.userId: UUID string (optional when contactValue is provided)
parameters.contactValue: sender contact value (optional when userId is provided)

tools.name: get_group_context
tools.description: Nara backend tool. Resolve a WhatsApp group into Nara group context, recent messages, recent summaries, digest settings, and group-specific instructions. Use after get_user_context for group conversations.

parameters.userId: UUID string (optional when contactValue is provided)
parameters.contactValue: sender contact value (optional when userId is provided)
parameters.groupExternalId: WhatsApp group id/JID from the runtime (required)

tools.name: record_group_messages
tools.description: Nara backend tool. Store real group transcript messages provided by the WhatsApp runtime. Do not invent messages.

parameters.userId: UUID string (optional when contactValue is provided)
parameters.contactValue: sender contact value (optional when userId is provided)
parameters.groupExternalId: WhatsApp group id/JID from the runtime (required)
parameters.messages: array of { senderContactValue?, senderDisplayName?, body, occurredAt?, metadata? }

tools.name: configure_group_summary
tools.description: Nara backend tool. Enable or change group summary preferences. Respect assistantProfile.autonomy and include confirmed=true only after confirmation when required.

parameters.userId: UUID string (optional when contactValue is provided)
parameters.contactValue: sender contact value (optional when userId is provided)
parameters.groupExternalId: WhatsApp group id/JID from the runtime (required)
parameters.summaryTimezone: IANA timezone string (optional, defaults to Asia/Jakarta)
parameters.digestTarget: group | owner | admin (optional, defaults to group)
parameters.confirmed: boolean (required when user autonomy requires confirmation)

tools.name: save_group_summary
tools.description: Nara backend tool. Save a concise group digest generated from real group messages provided by the WhatsApp runtime.

parameters.userId: UUID string (optional when contactValue is provided)
parameters.contactValue: sender contact value (optional when userId is provided)
parameters.groupExternalId: WhatsApp group id/JID from the runtime (required)
parameters.title: string (required)
